item.title: WholeClear EDB to PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: WholeClear EDB to PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: ellasmith
item.itunes:summary:
WholeClear EDB to PST Converter
(Utilities)
WholeClear EDB to PST Converter Tool to effortlessly convert Exchange EDB files to PST file format quickly. We are offering multiple useful attributes in this tool that quickly recover corrupted data from exchange EDB files and then export it into Outlook PST file format. It also enables the migration of single and bulk Exchange EDB files into Outlook PST file format at once. It can export any size of Exchange EDB files without any kind of restriction. We have a professional development staff that meets the necessities of users. Its user interface is easy to utilize and comprehend for non-technical or technical users. In addition, it offers a free demo pack in which users can convert a few EDB files into Outlook PST without spending the fee, and understand how it works.

[read more]

We have a professional development staff that meets the necessities of users. Its user interface is easy to utilize and comprehend for non-technical or technical users. In addition, it offers a free demo pack in which users can convert a few EDB files into Outlook PST without spending the fee, and understand how it works.

[read more]

item.title: Softaken MBOX To PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Softaken MBOX To PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: softaken-tools
item.itunes:summary:
Softaken MBOX To PST Converter
(Utilities)
Softaken MBOX to PST converter, which allows you to migrate multiple mailboxes to Outlook PST format at the same time. This software is a completely professional solution that can be used by both technical and nontechnical users. You can work with this software without any mistakes. The Softaken MBOX to PST converter can be efficiently operated on both the platforms on the domestic stage and as well as professional stage, whereas offers 24/7 technical support by the technical assistance team. You will experience no difficulties while exploring its programming features.
This tool has many multi-advanced features which can make your work more attractive.

• MBOX to PST conversion that is quick and error-free.
• This software allows users to keep all types of MBOX, MBX, and MBS file formats.
• It works with mbox-supported email clients- Thunderbird, AppleMail, SeaMonkey, OperaMail, etc.
• One-time software purchases can be beneficial for your lifetime use.
• Well it exports in bulk from MBOX file to Outlook PST format.
• Emails and attachments from MBOX were successfully migrated to PST and other formats.
• This is an independent utility
[read more]

[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3][b] FIND MORE PROJECT FROM ☞ [/h3] [/b] [url=https://www.pling.com/u/revwhiteshadow] @revWhiteShadow [/url]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3][b]About.[/b][/h3]

GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, developed by revWhiteShadow, is a revolutionary module designed to enhance the aiming capabilities of players in online multiplayer games. The main feature of this module is its ability to fix aim assets, ensuring precise and accurate aiming in various gaming scenarios.

One of the common challenges in online multiplayer games is the inconsistency of aim, often caused by factors like latency and input delay. However, with GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, these issues are effectively addressed. The module incorporates advanced algorithms and techniques to minimize gyrodelay, resulting in a significantly improved aiming experience.

By utilizing GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, players can expect a noticeable reduction in aim drift and smoother tracking of targets. The module intelligently compensates for any discrepancies caused by system lag or controller input delay, allowing players to maintain consistent and reliable aim throughout their gameplay.

Whether engaging in intense first-person shooters or competitive multiplayer battles, GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST provides players with a powerful tool to elevate their aiming skills and gain a competitive edge. With its innovative technology, this module aims to enhance the overall gaming experience, ensuring precise and accurate aim for players in online multiplayer environments.

GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, developed by revWhiteShadow, is a revolutionary module designed to enhance the aiming capabilities of players in online multiplayer games. The main feature of this module is its ability to fix aim assets, ensuring precise and accurate aiming in various gaming scenarios.

One of the common challenges in online multiplayer games is the inconsistency of aim, often caused by factors like latency and input delay. By utilizing GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, players can expect a noticeable reduction in aim drift and smoother tracking of targets. The module intelligently compensates for any discrepancies caused by system lag or controller input delay, allowing players to maintain consistent and reliable aim throughout their gameplay.

Whether engaging in intense first-person shooters or competitive multiplayer battles, GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST provides players with a powerful tool to elevate their aiming skills and gain a competitive edge. item.title: Windows 11 Start Menu [Windong] [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: Windows 11 Start Menu [Windong] [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: ngupiware
item.itunes:summary:
Windows 11 Start Menu [Windong]
(Graphic Apps)
Windong 11 start menu is a start menu similar to windows 11 start menu for linux.
1. Fast Menu
2. Auto detect Installed / removed Apps
3. Auto Detect Icons
4. Responsive
5. Light
6. Easy to install


HOW TO INSTALL (Watch Video On Top )
1. Open Terminal and type : Bash install.sh
2. Add Windong11-Button to Panel

[read more]

4. Responsive

item.title: MD Router Control [Network]
item.itunes:title: MD Router Control [Network]
item.itunes:author: md2222
item.itunes:summary:
MD Router Control
(Network)
Opens your router's web interface by one click on the tray icon. The password is saved by libsecret. After closing the interface window, checks connection to the test address and changes tray icon color.
Based on webkit2gtk.

2.1.1 - The password is saved by libsecret.
[read more]
item.description:
MD Router Control
(Network)
Opens your router's web interface by one click on the tray icon. The password is saved by libsecret. After closing the interface window, checks connection to the test address and changes tray icon color.
Based on webkit2gtk.

2.1.1 - The password is saved by libsecret.
[read more]

[read more]

item.title: WholeClear EML to MBOX Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: WholeClear EML to MBOX Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: ellasmith
item.itunes:summary:
WholeClear EML to MBOX Converter
(Utilities)
Use Our WholeClear EML to MBOX Converter software to convert a large number of EML files to MBOX. This program facilitates and eases the migration process for all kinds of users. Your whole data is protected during conversion by this tool. It requests your consent to save data in the location you specify locally. This program is built on an innovative technological tool that accomplishes conversion in an entirely safe manner. It works with all mbox support emails application like- AppleMail, Thunderbird, SeaMonkey, OperaMail, PocoMail, etc.
You can convert EML files to mbox for free by utilizing the demo version of this EML Converter, which is available for free download on its official websites. While converting your data to EML and MBOX, you can preview and scan the whole file. Use the filtering option to export only particular data. This program can be used for both official and commercial purposes, and it operates quickly without requiring the installation of Microsoft Outlook. It Convert without making any mistakes, Quick and easy conversion

Read More:- https://www.wholeclear.com/eml/mbox/
[read more]

item.title: GAME DOMAIN - NRGD [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GAME DOMAIN - NRGD [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GAME DOMAIN - NRGD
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
GAME DOMAIN Magisk Module by revWhiteShadow: Elevate Your Gaming Experience
The GAME DOMAIN Magisk Module which No Root users can use with shizuku , developed by revWhiteShadow, is a tribute to the anime world's dynamic power moves, inspired by Jujutsu Kaisen's "Domain Expansion." Just as Domain Expansion signifies an overwhelming force, the GAME DOMAIN module brings an unparalleled gaming experience to your Android device.

Game-Specific Kernel Tweaks: 30 Game Tweak Enhancements

GAME DOMAIN caters to a wide range of popular games, providing dedicated kernel tweaks to optimize your gaming sessions. Here are the 23 game-specific kernel tweaks that have been meticulously added:

1. PUBG Mobile (PUBGM)
2. Call of Duty: Mobile (CODM)
3. Genshin Impact
4. Free Fire
5. Mobile Legends: Bang Bang
6. Asphalt 9: Legends
7. Apex Legends Mobile
8. Arena of Valor
9. Critical Ops
10. Dead by Daylight Mobile
11. Mobile Legends: Adventure
12. Black Desert Mobile
13. Injustice 2
14. World War Heroes: WW2 FPS
15. Star Wars: Force Arena
16. Shadowgun Legends
17. Standoff 2
18. Battle Prime
19. Super Mecha Champions
20. Free Fire Max
21. PUBG Mobile Lite
22. Call of Duty: Warzone
23. Tanks A Lot! - Realtime Multiplayer Battle Arena
24. F1 Mobile Racing
25. Real Racing
26. BGMI (Battlegrounds Mobile India)
27. Arena Breakout
28. Minecraft
29. CARxSTREET
30. Diablo Immortal

GAME DOMAIN ensures that each game receives specific optimizations tailored to its requirements. Whether you're battling in the intense landscapes of PUBG Mobile, exploring the fantastical realm of Genshin Impact, or racing through the tracks of Real Racing, this module has you covered.

Revitalize your gaming sessions with GAME DOMAIN and experience the power of dedicated kernel tweaks that enhance performance, graphics, and overall gameplay. Elevate your gaming to the next level and embrace the Domain Expansion of your Android gaming experience.

item.title: FAT Files Restore Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: FAT Files Restore Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: ntfsfilerecovery
item.itunes:summary:
FAT Files Restore Software
(Utilities)
Screenshots recovery software is able to restore formatted screenshots, images, video and audio files lost due to disk formation process or OS error from FAT 32 hard disk partitioned in fewer clicks of mouse. FAT Files Restore Software is capable to retrieve damage pictures and screenshots misplaced due to improper cut/copy-paste operation or any similar reason of data loss from hard disk drive in less time requirement.

[read more]
item.description:
